title: charred juicy norwegian reindeer tagine
description: a quick-fix norwegian dish featuring balsamic vinegar and tagine-cook. perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: preheat the oven to 400f. place the reindeer steaks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
brush the reindeer steaks with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
place the baking sheet in the oven and cook for 10 minutes.
while the reindeer steaks are cooking, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a tagine or large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the cherry tomatoes to the tagine and cook until they start to release their juices, about 5 minutes.
add the bay leaves, apple cider vinegar, balsamic vinegar, brown sugar, and red pepper flakes to the tagine. stir to combine.
remove the reindeer steaks from the oven and add them to the tagine.
cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the reindeer steaks are cooked to your desired level of doneness.
remove the bay leaves and garnish with fresh parsley.
